# FlashPreviews Consulting Group

> FlashPreviews Consulting Group builds programmatic SEO systems, lead generation engines, and bilingual acquisition infrastructure that turn search demand into qualified leads. Beverly Hills, CA. Tel: (310) 846-1658.

## What We Do
We build lead generation systems — not just websites. Specializing in programmatic SEO, bilingual acquisition, and automated client delivery for attorneys, real estate professionals, and local service businesses.

## Core Services
- [Programmatic SEO Systems](https://www.flashpreviewsconsultinggroup.com/) — Thousands of targeted pages capturing high-intent search demand
- [Lead Generation Engines](https://www.flashpreviewsconsultinggroup.com/) — End-to-end capture, qualify, and deliver pipeline
- [Bilingual Acquisition Systems](https://www.flashpreviewsconsultinggroup.com/) — English + Spanish reach

## Case Study
- [MarVistaLaw](https://www.flashpreviewsconsultinggroup.com/case-study) — 30,000+ pages, 22,000+ impressions in 7 days, $1,000/lead value, California statewide

## Model
One system per market. One operator per vertical. Market exclusivity guaranteed.
